title: Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indifi Technologies Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Indifi Technologies Holdings Services:
Indifi Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies Holdings Services!
